MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DIGIACOMO INSURANCE CO., LAWRENCE DIGIACOMO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted and denied in part. The motion is granted without leave to amend as to the emotional distress allegations that are alleged against the moving defendants. The motion is denied as to the general damages allegations. The motion is denied as to the claim for attorney's fees. The complaint is seeking those fees as damages under the tort of another doctrine. The motion is denied as to the punitive damages allegations because plaintiff does not seek that relief from defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DIGIACOMO INSURANCE CO., LAWRENCE DIGIACOMO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled as to the breach of oral contract cause of action. The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the negligent misrepresentation cause of action for plaintiff to allege the claim with more particularity. See Charnay v. Cobert (2006) 145 Cal.App.4th 170, 185, fn. 14. The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the declaratory relief cause of action. See CCP 1061. The claim is not necessary as plaintiff's other claims can address the issues raised by the declaratory relief cause of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
